### Content Audit and PSU Articles

  - [PSU (presumably Product-Specific Update) articles often rank high for long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Process for updating PSU articles:](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Check main keyword and US SERP ranking using Ahrefs plugin](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [If ranking 1st, tag as "keep"](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [If not in top 3, consider optimizing (expand content, improve examples, add benefits)](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
